items.title: The Impact of Minority-Race Status on the Cross-Race Effect: A Critical Review
items.author: Dilhan Töredi, Jamal K. Mansour, Sian E. Jones, Faye Skelton, Alex McIntyre
items.content: <article>Perspectives on Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. Meta-analyses have consistently demonstrated the robustness of the cross-race effect (CRE; i.e., better recognition of same-race faces compared with different-race faces). These analyses have unveiled variations in the dependent variables associated with ...</article>
